mutations.name: approveDeployments
mutations.description: Approve all pending deployments under one or more environments.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: deployments
returnFields.description: The affected deployments.

returnFields.name: autoMerged
returnFields.description: True if the default branch has been auto-merged into the deployment ref.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: deployment
returnFields.description: The new deployment.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: deploymentStatus
returnFields.description: The new deployment status.

mutations.name: createEnvironment
mutations.description: Creates an environment or simply returns it if already exists.

returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: environment
returnFields.description: The new or existing environment.

returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: environment
returnFields.description: The environment that was pinned.

returnFields.name: pinnedEnvironment
returnFields.description: The pinned environment if we pinned.

mutations.name: rejectDeployments
mutations.description: Reject all pending deployments under one or more environments.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: deployments
returnFields.description: The affected deployments.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: environment
returnFields.description: The environment that was reordered.

returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: environment
returnFields.description: The updated environment.

objects.name: DeployedEvent
objects.description: Represents adeployedevent on a given pull request.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: Identifies the actor who performed the event.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: deployment
fields.description: The deployment associated with thedeployedevent.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the DeployedEvent object.

fields.name: pullRequest
fields.description: PullRequest referenced by event.

fields.name: ref
fields.description: The ref associated with thedeployedevent.

fields.name: commit
fields.description: Identifies the commit sha of the deployment.

fields.description: Identifies the oid of the deployment commit, even if the commit has been deleted.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: Identifies the actor who triggered the deployment.

fields.name: repository

fields.name: state
fields.description: The current state of the deployment.

fields.name: statuses
fields.description: A list of statuses associated with the deployment.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: comment
inputFields.description: Optional comment for approving deployments.

inputFields.name: environmentIds
inputFields.description: The ids of environments to reject deployments.

inputFields.name: workflowRunId
inputFields.description: The node ID of the workflow run containing the pending deployments.

inputFields.name: autoMerge
inputFields.description: Attempt to automatically merge the default branch into the requested ref, defaults to true.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Short description of the deployment.

inputFields.name: environment
inputFields.description: Name for the target deployment environment.

inputFields.name: payload
inputFields.description: JSON payload with extra information about the deployment.

inputFields.name: refId
inputFields.description: The node ID of the ref to be deployed.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: The node ID of the repository.

inputFields.name: requiredContexts
inputFields.description: The status contexts to verify against commit status checks. To bypass required contexts, pass an empty array. Defaults to all unique contexts.

inputFields.name: task
inputFields.description: Specifies a task to execute.

inputFields.name: autoInactive
inputFields.description: Adds a new inactive status to all non-transient, non-production environment deployments with the same repository and environment name as the created status's deployment.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: deploymentId
inputFields.description: The node ID of the deployment.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: A short description of the status. Maximum length of 140 characters.

inputFields.name: environment
inputFields.description: If provided, updates the environment of the deploy. Otherwise, does not modify the environment.

inputFields.name: environmentUrl
inputFields.description: Sets the URL for accessing your environment.

inputFields.name: logUrl
inputFields.description: The log URL to associate with this status. This URL should contain output to keep the user updated while the task is running or serve as historical information for what happened in the deployment.

inputFields.name: state
inputFields.description: The state of the deployment.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: The name of the environment.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: The node ID of the repository.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The Node ID of the deployment to be deleted.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: The Node ID of the environment to be deleted.

inputFields.name: direction
inputFields.description: The ordering direction.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field to order deployments by.

inputFields.name: direction
inputFields.description: The direction in which to order environments by the specified field.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field to order environments by.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: environmentId
inputFields.description: The ID of the environment to modify.

inputFields.name: pinned
inputFields.description: The desired state of the environment. If true, environment will be pinned. If false, it will be unpinned.

inputFields.name: direction
inputFields.description: The direction in which to order pinned environments by the specified field.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field to order pinned environments by.

inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: comment
inputFields.description: Optional comment for rejecting deployments.

inputFields.name: environmentIds

inputFields.description: The node ID of the workflow run containing the pending deployments.

inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: environmentId
inputFields.description: The ID of the environment to modify.
